name: Contract Redline (Playbook-Driven)
description: Automated playbook-driven redline of a counterparty draft. Extracts clauses, resolves the four-tier cascade (firm / client / matter / personal), and returns clause-by-clause accept/redline/escalate/delete with proposed replacement language and an executive summary. Replaces Definely, Kira/Luminance, and 4–8 hrs of associate markup.
promptTemplate:
Run a full playbook-driven redline of the following counterparty draft. Practice area: {{practiceArea}}. Jurisdiction: {{jurisdiction}}. Identify all clauses that deviate from the firm's playbook, propose specific replacement language, and flag any red lines crossed.

{{description}}

substitutions.description: Paste or reference the counterparty draft text here.
